arcade.name: Millrace Arcade
arcade.summary: Playable browser games from Millrace, led by Corebound's v0.7.0 HUD Breakthrough release, Dark Factory Dispatch's v0.7.0 Factory Floor Repair release, Void Prospector's v0.7.0 Flight Readability Repair first-contract release, and Iron Lantern Descent's v0.4.0 Echo Relay Network release.

games.title: Corebound
games.summary: Pilot Mantis-01 through a compact overlay HUD, keyboard and touch menu surfaces, surface dock services, richer material strata, embedded ore and hazard pockets, smooth drill breakthrough feedback, and progressively revealed contracts, Deep Charters, late routes, archives, relay utilities, upgrades, and research.

release.label: v0.7.0 HUD Breakthrough
release.copy: HUD Breakthrough keeps the mine dominant with a compressed overlay, moves detail into the shared menu surface, preserves surface dock actions, enriches strata and embedded ore or hazard pockets, and lets drilled blocks break open with continuous breakthrough motion instead of a cell-center snap.

versions.label: v0.7.0 HUD Breakthrough
versions.summary: Compact overlay HUD, surface dock services, richer strata, embedded ore and hazard pockets, smooth breakthrough release motion, and subtler grid readability publish on top of the Viewport Material release.

versions.label: v0.6.0 Viewport Material
versions.summary: Viewport-fitted HUD, menu and surface dock services, material terrain rendering, embedded ore and hazard pockets, and material motion feedback publish on top of the Resistance Start release.

versions.label: v0.5.0 Resistance Start
versions.summary: Stateful drill resistance, terrain-hardness contact progress, first-session objectives, persistent menu help, and staged system reveals land on top of the Natural Motion asset release.

versions.label: v0.4.0 Natural Motion
versions.summary: Continuous held-input rig motion, camera-follow drilling, generated bitmap terrain and vehicle assets, surface facilities, ore or hazard readables, HUD icons, and visible upgrade or research identity land on top of the Deep Charter release.

versions.label: v0.3.0 Deep Charter
versions.summary: Deep Charters, late routes, choir trench rewards, and anchor recall extend the Corebound run beyond the v0.2.0 contract/archive foundation.

versions.label: v0.2.0 continuity
versions.summary: Contracts, archive sigils, relay reputation, scanner sweeps, route beacons, and coolant support now connect the mine run to visible long-term progression.

games.title: Dark Factory Dispatch
games.summary: Run a compact machine-intelligence factory from a repaired factory-floor surface with a guided Training Shift, visible Forge Line, Assembler Bay, and Clean Room lanes, click-first job assignment, contextual Start, Overdrive, Pause, and Recover actions, deterministic production, jam and recovery feedback, shift summaries, local lane, job, fault, and title art, procedural output and incident signals, and advanced Grid Siege, Signal Breach, Freight Lockdown, Rail Sabotage, Crisis Arbitration, and upgrade systems staged behind later-shift disclosure.

release.label: v0.7.0 Factory Floor Repair
release.copy: Factory Floor Repair replaces the old default operations wall with a compact training-first dispatch surface: the first screen centers the factory floor, shows the current objective, core resources, incoming jobs, selected detail, contextual actions, and a short log, then preserves Crisis Arbitration, Rail Sabotage, Freight Lockdown, Signal Breach, Grid Siege, and upgrades behind progressive disclosure.

versions.label: v0.7.0 Factory Floor Repair
versions.summary: Guided Training Shift, dominant three-lane factory floor, click-first job and lane actions, assignment, production, output, jam, recovery, and overdrive feedback, shift-summary upgrade choice, local asset pack plus procedural feedback hooks, and progressive advanced-system disclosure publish on top of Crisis Arbitration.

versions.label: v0.6.0 Crisis Arbitration
versions.summary: Cross-system crisis dockets, evidence packet assignments, protected lane or dock decisions, binding priority rulings, emergency overrides, deferrals, timer failures, and outcome scars publish on top of Rail Sabotage.

versions.label: v0.5.0 Rail Sabotage
versions.summary: Hostile rail cells, suspect cargo manifests, dock patrol and decoy decisions, sabotage scans, carrier reroutes, interceptions, lane repairs, containment outcomes, and restart scars publish on top of Freight Lockdown.

versions.label: v0.4.0 Freight Lockdown
versions.summary: Outbound freight manifests, dock loading windows, cargo staging, carrier seals, route-security escorts, reserve launch clearance, reroutes around contaminated sectors, cargo-integrity outcomes, and freight carryover publish on top of the Signal Breach release.

versions.label: v0.3.0 Signal Breach
versions.summary: Hostile signal intrusion, compromised queue entries, trace deadlines, lane quarantine, reserve-powered sector shields, countermeasure jobs, and persistent breach scars publish on top of the Grid Siege release.

versions.label: v0.2.0 Grid Siege
versions.summary: Facility power routing, reserve batteries, blackout lockouts, Reserve Ledger Audit directives, and carryover grid scars publish on top of Escalation Shift's emergency queue and lane overdrive loop.

versions.label: v0.1.0 Escalation Shift
versions.summary: Escalating shift demand, emergency coolant-diversion contracts, emergency-first queue policy, lane overdrive decisions, persistent restart ledger carryover, and the original three-lane factory dispatch board.

versions.label: v0.0.1 Dispatch Floor
versions.summary: Three-lane factory dispatch board with queued jobs, timed contracts, recoverable material and logic faults, upgrade choices, and original local lane, job, fault, and title-card art.

games.title: Void Prospector
games.summary: Pilot the Prospector Kite through a readable first-contract 3D mining loop with labeled Cinder Node and Frontier Spoke markers, a center reticle, compact objective and resource HUD, keyboard-driven X/Y/Z flight, visible thrust, mining beam, ore sparks, depleted-node feedback, docking corridor, station sale, refuel, repair, and Refined Beam preview, post-tutorial Knife Wake pirate warnings, and the later Survey Ladder, salvage, convoy, storm, interdiction, and Signal Gate systems preserved behind progressive disclosure.

release.label: v0.7.0 Flight Readability Repair
release.copy: Flight Readability Repair rebuilds the first Void Prospector session around the scene: Cinder Node and Frontier Spoke are labeled in-world, the compact cockpit shows only objective, resources, reticle, radar, prompts, and target card, mining uses a beam, ore glow, sparks, cargo feedback, and depleted-state cues, docking exposes a corridor plus sale/refuel/repair summary and Refined Beam preview, and Knife Wake pressure waits until the first contract is complete.

versions.label: v0.7.0 Flight Readability Repair
versions.summary: Readable first-contract cockpit, labeled Cinder Node and Frontier Spoke, compact HUD, keyboard 3D flight with vertical trim, mining beam, ore glow, sparks, cargo and depleted-node feedback, dockable station corridor, sale/refuel/repair summary, Refined Beam preview, and post-contract Knife Wake warning visibility publish on top of Signal Gate Expedition.

versions.label: v0.6.0 Signal Gate Expedition
versions.summary: Signal Gate relay gates, harmonics scans, pylon alignment, capacitor charging, storm-window anchoring, convoy transit commitments, station tuning, pirate gate-jam mitigation, forced or aborted openings, and complete/partial/failed transit payouts publish on top of Knife Wake Interdiction.

versions.label: v0.5.0 Knife Wake Interdiction
versions.summary: Active pirate cells, transponder scans, distress or decoy markers, lure deployment, convoy and salvage raid responses, station patrol support, cargo-loss escapes, and complete/partial/failed interdiction payouts publish on top of Storm Cartography.

versions.label: v0.4.0 Storm Cartography
versions.summary: Deep-signal storm fronts, safe-window charting, relay anchors, Tempest Verge, storm support services, salvage reroutes, convoy timing, and complete/partial/failed storm payouts publish on top of Beacon Convoy.

versions.label: v0.3.0 Beacon Convoy
versions.summary: Deployable route beacons, convoy cargo runs, escort integrity, ambush and hazard pressure, station escort drones, signal jammers, countermeasure bursts, and full or partial convoy payouts publish on top of Derelict Salvage.

versions.label: v0.2.0 Derelict Salvage
versions.summary: Selectable relay caches, derelict hulls, volatile wreckage, signal locks, extraction pressure, station rig and recovery drone support, salvage value, and relic recovery publish on top of the Survey Ladder campaign.

versions.label: v0.1.0 Survey Ladder
versions.summary: Three-sector Survey Ladder campaign with route selection, anomaly scans, hazard charting, station probe and decoy services, tiered pirate pressure, and the original mining, docking, upgrade, and local-asset flight loop.

versions.label: v0.0.1 First Sortie
versions.summary: Local Three.js flight shell with connected mining, docking, charter, upgrade, pirate-pressure loop, and original project-local ship, asteroid, station, hostile-marker, and title-card art.

games.title: Iron Lantern Descent
games.summary: Descend from the iron lift into a compact 3D faultline cave, manage oxygen, lantern route confidence, survey seams, Deep Pumpworks flood pressure, Cinder Vent Network airflow, and Echo Relay Network signals, then repair relay pylons, spool broken signal cables, triangulate echo routes, claim rescue caches, fire emergency lift beacons, mine boosted samples, bank map plates, and buy carryover upgrades.

release.label: v0.4.0 Echo Relay Network
release.copy: Echo Relay Network extends Cinder Vent Network with repairable echo pylons, broken signal cable spans, echo-charge triangulation, rescue caches, emergency lift beacons, relay-window pressure, survey, pumpworks, and vent prerequisites, route-stability relief, sample bonuses, and lift-banked echo map progress.

versions.label: v0.4.0 Echo Relay Network
versions.summary: Echo Relay Network adds echo relay alcove and lift beacon station passages, relay-pylon repair, cable-spooling, echo triangulation, rescue-cache and emergency-beacon decisions, route-stability relief, sample bonuses, and echo map progress on top of Cinder Vent Network.

versions.label: v0.3.0 Cinder Vent Network
versions.summary: Cinder Vent Network adds cinder vent shaft and fan relay bay passages, draft-gate, filter, fan, and gas-pocket decisions, stale-air and airflow relief, fresh-air relay payouts, route-stability recovery, sample bonuses, and vent map progress on top of Deep Pumpworks.

versions.label: v0.2.0 Deep Pumpworks
versions.summary: Deep Pumpworks adds lower pumpworks and sump bypass passages, pump and valve decisions, flood windows, leak sealing, siphon charges, drainage payouts, route-stability relief, sample bonuses, and pumpworks map progress on top of Faultline Survey.

versions.label: v0.1.0 Faultline Survey
versions.summary: Faultline Survey adds survey sites, stakes, brace frames, tremor windows, air-cache recovery, map plate progress, survey payouts, and procedural faultline cave content on top of the Lantern Route survival loop.

versions.label: v0.0.1 Lantern Route
versions.summary: Local Three.js cave descent with oxygen pressure, lantern-route anchors, mineable mineral samples, hazard zones, lift banking, upgrade carryover, and original project-local cave assets.
